creator: lioux@gns.com.br
text:
The dotfile port needs the wm program to interact with the
Desktop. However, the port file does not mention it.

Fix: 

The following patch corrects this problem by both adding the
run dependency to the port Makefile and by adding patch-02 to the
patches directory that changes all references from wm to wm2 due to
the nature of the wm2:${PORTSDIR}/x11/wm2 port.
	Patch URI: ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/dotfile.patch.gz
